title: Syzygium amieuense
taxonomy: Syzygium amieuense is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and is part of the Syzygium genus. The classification of Syzygium amieuense is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Eudicots, clade - Rosids, order - Myrtales, family - Myrtaceae, genus - Syzygium, species - S. amieuense. Further classification includes the tribe - Myrteae and subtribe - Myrtinae. The classification reflects its relationship to other plants within the Myrtaceae family.
